title: Ombudsman Guide
subtitle: Documents needed for your Ombudsman complaint
pro_tip_text: Keep all documents in PDF format for easy submission.

rejection.title: Rejection Letter
rejection.description: The official letter from your insurer stating the reason for claim rejection.
tips: Request in writing if not received
Keep both email and physical copies

policy.title: Policy Copy
policy.description: Your complete insurance policy document including terms and conditions.

kyc.title: KYC Documents
kyc.description: Identity and address proof required for the Ombudsman complaint.
